title: Automate email notifications based on people column value

posts.author: HelenCC (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for a recipe which would allow me to send an email that would have different content, based on who was assigned the item in a people field. It would look something like this:

When an item moves to this board (or group), and if the People column is = to X, then send gmail
